allow: Bash(tail -15 /tmp/autodoc_build.log 2>&1 || echo "лог ещё пуст"; echo "---"; docker images --filter "reference=autodoc*" --format "{{.Repository}}\\t{{.Size}}\\t{{.CreatedSince}}")

Bash(python -c "from app.config import settings; print\('SECRET_KEY:', settings.SECRET_KEY[:12], '...'\); print\('WHISPER:', settings.WHISPER_MODEL_SIZE, settings.WHISPER_DEVICE\); print\('TTS:', settings.TTS_ENGINE, settings.EDGE_TTS_VOICE\); print\('TOKEN_EXP:', settings.ACCESS_TOKEN_EXPIRE_MINUTES\)")
Bash(python -m py_compile app/services/screenshot_processor.py app/services/ai_service.py app/celery_tasks.py app/api/sessions.py app/config.py)
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('\\n'.join\(m['name'] for m in d.get\('models',[]\)\) or '\(нет моделей\)'\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('\\n'.join\(m['name'] for m in d.get\('models',[]\)\) or '\(пусто — модель не скачана\)'\)")
Bash(python -m py_compile app/api/sessions.py app/services/screenshot_processor.py app/services/ai_service.py app/api/export.py app/services/shorts_generator_sync.py)

PowerShell(docker compose exec -T postgres psql -U autodoc -d autodoc_db -c "SELECT s.step_number, CASE WHEN s.screenshot_path='' OR s.screenshot_path IS NULL THEN '<EMPTY>' ELSE s.screenshot_path END AS screenshot, s.click_x, s.click_y, s.screenshot_width AS vw, s.screenshot_height AS vh FROM guide_steps s JOIN guides g ON g.id=s.guide_id WHERE g.id=2 ORDER BY s.step_number;")

PowerShell("=== real PNG size \(screenshot_0\) ==="; docker compose exec -T autodoc-ai python -c "from PIL import Image; im=Image.open\('/data/screenshots/c7ed0aea-32a4-49e5-b32c-b08af64c003b/screenshot_0.png'\); print\('PNG:', im.size, '| viewport CSS: 1920x1039 | DPR=', round\(im.size[0]/1920,3\)\)"; "=== POST /video/generate/2 ==="; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8888/api/v1/video/generate/2" -Method Post -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"tts_engine":"edge","tts_voice":"ru-RU-SvetlanaNeural"}'; $r | ConvertTo-Json } catch { "HTTP STATUS: $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__\)"; $_.ErrorDetails.Message })
PowerShell(docker compose exec -T postgres psql -U autodoc -d autodoc_db -c "SELECT status, shorts_video_path, shorts_duration_seconds, error_message FROM guides WHERE id=2;")
PowerShell(docker compose exec -T autodoc-ai ffprobe -v error -show_entries stream=codec_type,codec_name -of default=noprint_wrappers=1 "/data/output/video_c7ed0aea-32a4-49e5-b32c-b08af64c003b.mp4")
Bash(python -m py_compile app/api/guides.py app/api/sessions.py app/database.py app/models.py)
